name: seconds-clock
title: Seconds Clock
description: A polished seconds clock with multiple timers and a stopwatch for Raycast.
author: hyder

commands.name: show-seconds-clock
commands.title: Show Seconds Clock
commands.description: Show a live digital clock with seconds.

commands.name: set-timer
commands.title: Set Timer
commands.description: Set a named countdown timer for the menu bar.

commands.name: manage-timers
commands.title: Manage Timers
commands.description: Manage running timers and choose the menu bar timer.

commands.name: start-stopwatch
commands.title: Start Stopwatch
commands.description: Start a stopwatch in the menu bar.

commands.name: menu-bar-clock
commands.title: Seconds Clock Menu Bar
commands.description: Show the active timer or stopwatch in the menu bar.

preferences.name: timeFormat
preferences.title: Time Format
preferences.description: Choose whether the clock uses a 12-hour or 24-hour format.
